name: Recovery and Regeneration
goal: Optimize recovery after physical and mental exertion
goal_ru: Оптимизация восстановления после физических и умственных нагрузок
recommendations: Prioritize sleep (7-9h) as primary recovery tool
Active recovery: light walking, stretching on rest days
Magnesium supplementation before bed for muscle recovery
HRV-guided training: skip intense workout if HRV low
Massage or foam rolling 2-3x per week
